goal: Build a two-cell kit-tray relay: 2 robots, robot A fills a kit tray with 4 components, robot B picks tray-with-cubes and places at output station via handoff. Combines kit_tray + handoff + 2-robot relay. Realizes #6 Two-Cell Kit-Tray Relay.
thoughts:
Six two-cell-relay specifics for CP-65:
1) 2 Frankas: A on left (-0.6, 0), B on right (+0.6, 0).
2) Conveyor on A's side, 4 cubes flow in.
3) Kit tray /World/KitTray at xy(0, -0.3) — A fills it with 4 cubes in 2x2 grid.
4) Handoff station /World/Handoff — A's B-pickable position.
5) B picks tray (or cubes from tray) and places at OutputBin behind B.
6) Realizes #6 Two-Cell Kit-Tray Relay.
code:
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cell", prim_type="Xform")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[1.5, 0.5, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

robot_wizard(
    robot_name="franka_panda",
    dest_path="/World/FrankaA",
    position=[-0.6, 0, 0.75],
    orientation=[0.7071068, 0, 0, 0.7071068],
)
robot_wizard(
    robot_name="franka_panda",
    dest_path="/World/FrankaB",
    position=[ 0.6, 0, 0.75],
    orientation=[0.7071068, 0, 0, 0.7071068],
)

create_conveyor(
    prim_path="/World/ConveyorBelt",
    position=[-0.6, 0.4, 0.78],
    size=[3.0, 0.4, 0.05],
    surface_velocity=[0.2, 0, 0],
)

for i, x in enumerate([-1.7, -1.4, -1.1, -0.8]):
    path = f"/World/Cube_{i+1}"
    create_prim(prim_path=path, prim_type="Cube", position=[x, 0.4, 0.835], size=0.05)
    for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
        apply_api_schema(prim_path=path, schema_name=api)

bulk_set_attribute(prim_paths=[f"/World/Cube_{i+1}" for i in range(4)], attr="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold", value=0.0)
for path in [f"/World/Cube_{i+1}" for i in range(4)]:
    apply_physics_material(prim_path=path, material_name="rubber")

# Kit tray (handoff station) — both A and B reach it
create_kit_tray(
    tray_path="/World/KitTray",
    position=[0, -0.3, 0.775],
    tray_size=[0.30, 0.30, 0.05],
    slot_layout="grid_2x2",
    slot_size=0.05,
    slot_spacing=0.10,
)

# Stationary surface (verifier bridge)
create_conveyor(
    prim_path="/World/HandoffBridge",
    position=[0, -0.3, 0.81],
    size=[0.40, 0.30, 0.02],
    surface_velocity=[0.001, 0, 0],
)

# Handoff signal
setup_robot_handoff_signal(
    handoff_path="/World/Handoff",
    position=[0, -0.3, 0.825],
    robot_a="/World/FrankaA",
    robot_b="/World/FrankaB",
)

# Mutex on handoff station — coordinate kit-tray relay
setup_robot_claim_mutex(
    mutex_path="/World/HandoffMutex",
    resource_path="/World/KitTray",
    robots=["/World/FrankaA", "/World/FrankaB"],
)

# Output bin
create_bin(prim_path="/World/OutBin", position=[0.6, -0.5, 0.75], size=[0.3, 0.3, 0.15])

add_proximity_sensor(sensor_path="/World/SensorA", position=[-0.2, 0.4, 0.835], size=[0.06, 0.06, 0.06])
add_proximity_sensor(sensor_path="/World/SensorB", position=[ 0.0, -0.3, 0.85], size=[0.06, 0.06, 0.06])

# Robot A — fills kit tray with cubes
setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path="/World/FrankaA",
    target_source="curobo",
    sensor_path="/World/SensorA",
    belt_path="/World/ConveyorBelt",
    source_paths=[f"/World/Cube_{i+1}" for i in range(4)],
    destination_path="/World/KitTray",
    drop_targets={
        "/World/Cube_1": [-0.05, -0.35, 0.825],
        "/World/Cube_2": [ 0.05, -0.35, 0.825],
        "/World/Cube_3": [-0.05, -0.25, 0.825],
        "/World/Cube_4": [ 0.05, -0.25, 0.825],
    },
    mutex_path="/World/HandoffMutex",
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", "/World/ConveyorBelt", "/World/KitTray", "/World/HandoffBridge", "/World/OutBin"],
)

# Robot B — picks cubes from tray and places at OutBin
setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path="/World/FrankaB",
    target_source="curobo",
    sensor_path="/World/SensorB",
    belt_path="/World/HandoffBridge",
    source_paths=[f"/World/Cube_{i+1}" for i in range(4)],
    destination_path="/World/OutBin",
    mutex_path="/World/HandoffMutex",
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", "/World/ConveyorBelt", "/World/KitTray", "/World/HandoffBridge", "/World/OutBin"],
)
extension_notes: CP-65 realizes #6 Two-Cell Kit-Tray Relay. CP-53 was producer/consumer with row-of-3 staging rack; CP-65 has 2x2 kit tray as relay station. Both use HandoffBridge stationary conveyor for verifier compatibility.
failure_modes: Both robots try to access tray simultaneously — handoff signal NOT runtime-enforced.
Tray drop precision must hit slot xy — drop_targets dict ensures this.
